scripts.stress:front: pnpm --dir ../packages/v0.1 build && pnpm build && pnpm exec playwright test tests/front-stress.spec.ts
scripts.stress:front:strict: pnpm --dir ../packages/v0.1 build && pnpm build && STRESS_STRICT=true pnpm exec playwright test tests/front-stress.spec.ts
scripts.stress:front:ui: pnpm --dir ../packages/v0.1 build && pnpm build && pnpm exec playwright test tests/front-stress.spec.ts --headed --project=stress-chromium
